examples: There was a little wooden flute in there. I tootled on it and passed it around.
In the interval a blond boy dressed in white serenaded the company on the flute.
Marsyas thought he could play the flute better than Apollo and challenged the god to a contest.
Instead of the accordion, Jorge Continentos plays the wooden flute called the pifanos, among other wind instruments.
He made slight adjustments to accommodate Lovano's 12-piece orchestra, adding flute and tenor sax parts.
